O0100L2_RESP_POST_CD O0100L2 Special Treatments/Programs: Respite Post-admit Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received respite care within the last 14 days while a resident of this facility. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
